name: DevOps Agent
description: Build, start, stop, and test the lob-online system

name: Project Manager Agent
description: Manage the lob-online SDLC using GitHub as the source of truth

name: Rules Lawyer Agent
description: Rules arbiter and wargame analyst for the lob-online project

name: Issue Intake Agent
description: Turn a raw requirement into a filed, milestone-assigned GitHub issue with branch/PR lifecycle

name: Dev Build Skill
description: Format, lint, and build the lob-online project

name: Dev Test Skill
description: Run the full test suite with result snapshots and flake detection

name: Dev Start Skill
description: Launch server and Vite dev client with logging

name: Dev Stop Skill
description: Gracefully stop server and Vite dev client

name: PR Create Skill
description: Write a devlog entry then create the pull request on GitHub

name: PR Merge Skill
description: Squash-merge the current PR and delete the branch

name: PR Review Skill
description: Review the current PR for coding standards, test coverage, and common defects

name: Issue Implement Skill
description: Orchestrate the full ticket-to-merge workflow for a GitHub issue with human control points

name: Issue Branch Skill
description: Create the feat/{id}-{slug} branch for the given issue number

name: Issue Start Skill
description: Fetch a GitHub issue, summarise ACs, and confirm approach before any code is written
